creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
By applying the next patch, a version of transfig
becomes 3.2.1.

You should delete the files:
transfig/patches/patch-aa
transfig/patches/patch-ab
transfig/patches/patch-ad
transfig/patches/patch-ae

and

notice that transfig/patches/patch-af
is a new file.
